rationale: Translated one-line prompt into assumption ledger; logged three inflection points (store-location data provenance, location detection method, single result vs list) with simplest-within-reason defaults; no proper nouns since target is a store category, not a named brand.

Researched IP1 (probe-IP1): chose live public OpenStreetMap Overpass API (shop=alcohol, no key, browser-callable) over a region-bound static dataset; quick-reasoned IP2 (browser Geolocation + manual fallback) and IP3 (single closest store); surfaced TD IP4 (external directions hand-off, no embedded map). Broke build into 5 sections: location acquisition, store data lookup, closest-store selection/presentation, app shell, edge-case testing; wrote 7 interface contracts.

Structural audit of TD output against the literal prompt and Discovery's atomic intent: empty proper_nouns[] confirmed correct (no trademarked nouns in prompt); both high-importance IPs (IP1, IP2) resolved with evidence-backed action; every assertion carries a source field, external-system claims sourced to canonical_evidence with citation pointers; all four first_contact_requirements exercised by assertions; telos coherent with the section breakdown. No hard issues, no substantive open questions. Verdict: pass; build proceeds to Coordinator.
Linear dependency chain across sections 1-4; integrator pseudo-node depends on all feature sections; section-5 depends on integrator. Six single-node execution waves.

section-1 Location acquisition: geolocation auto-detect with always-visible manual entry and Nominatim geocoding, yielding {lat,lon,label,source}. All 5 acceptance assertions and 3 contracts verified; node --check clean.

section-2 Liquor-store data lookup: Overpass query (shop=alcohol/wine/beverages, around filter, out center), record normalization with placeholder substitution, graceful error/timeout/offline/empty handling — promise never rejects. All 5 acceptance assertions and 3 contracts verified.

section-3 Closest-store selection and presentation: haversine great-circle distance, single-closest selection, result card with name/address/distance and two external directions hand-off links, clear empty/error states, no in-app routing. All 5 acceptance assertions and 3 contracts verified.

section-4 App shell: self-contained browser-openable shell, flow orchestration location->lookup->present, loading/status/error states, radius-widening retry schedule, startup module-presence guard, fully vendored CSS/JS with no CDN. All 4 acceptance assertions and 3 contracts verified.

Assembled sections 1-4 into one single-file browser-openable app: CSS inlined in <style>, shell skeleton plus four module scripts inlined in strict dependency order so start() finds both DOM and globals. Resolved init-order, naming, and asset seams; zero CDN references; only OSM Overpass + Nominatim network calls. manifest.json written.

All 11 edge_case_testing assertions exercised against the integrated artifact under production fidelity: closest-store selection against known coordinates, normalization shape, geolocation-denied, Overpass failure/HTTP-error/timeout/offline, empty-result with radius widening, loading/error visibility, no-CDN network profile. 11/11 pass; no crash, no blank screen in any path. Two inline deviations logged (dev-001, dev-002).
All sections verified, integrator verified, edge-case testing executed. Build substrate complete and handed to post-build verification (Critic final sweep, ConvergenceVerifier, delivery, run report).

Final-sweep audit of the completed build substrate: writer-permission compliance, out-of-scope presence, file-schema conformance, section coverage, charter-implementation conformance against all 13 locked machine-checkable assertions (IP1-IP4), Sev-0 trivial-fix audit (none present), acceptance-assertion coverage, prose-coverage, and inline-deviation audit of dev-001/dev-002. 0 flags; all 9 checks passed. No escalation raised. Both inline deviations confirmed as verification-environment notes that do not change artifact, contract, or assumption. Build clears the gate to ConvergenceVerifier.

Exercised the integrated single-file index.html in a real headless Chromium under production fidelity. Tier 2: all 4 first-contact requirements pass (clean launch, no error screen, geolocation attempted with always-usable manual fallback, named store with address+distance, working directions hand-off links). Tier 1 PNV.1 passes: manual-entry path exercised live with real Nominatim geocode (HTTP 200); Overpass POST issued correctly but sandbox egress proxy returns HTTP 406 (environmental, confirmed via direct curl, matches dev-002) — artifact error handler caught it cleanly; Overpass component tagged modeled, canonical out:json payload run through artifact own unmodified normalize/select/render code produced correct named closest store + coordinate-prefilled directions links. Tier 3 + static: 6/6 assumptions honored, 7/7 out-of-scope items absent, 4/4 inflection-point defaults implemented, 11/11 edge-case-testing assertions confirmed and re-exercised. Verdict pass_with_concerns: sole residual is the environmental sandbox-cannot-reach-Overpass limitation, documented for the Uncertainty Manifest. No Sev 0 fix needed.

Critic final-sweep clean (0 flags); CV verdict pass_with_concerns; Orchestrator-led live verification in the user real browser confirmed the Overpass POST path works (27 real Chicago stores returned) - CV residual positively resolved. Copied integrated artifact to output/final/ byte-identical (no divergence record needed). Wrote run-report.md.
